description:
Verso: Letter fragment. In Judaeo-Arabic with occasional Hebrew. Wide space between the lines. In the hand of Natan b. Shemuel? Includes the rather violent lines, "We made them taste their desert of the scalding water of hell (ḥamīm al-istiḥqāq), and we took them with the severest [...], and we left them a degraded nation (ḥerpat ʿam)." 

Recto: Letter fragment in Hebrew, in a different hand. Greetings to Moshe and Peraḥya "his brother."
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
